title: Curious Lanterns
description: Adds a Hip Curio slot for supported lanterns! Dynamic Lighting requires your choice of dynamic lighting mod.
body:
This mod does not handle dynamic lighting.
Requires [Curios (Forge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios), [Radiant Gear](https://modrinth.com/mod/radiant-gear), and a compatible dynamic lights mod (see Radiant Gear for details).
For any dynamic lighting issues, please refer to your dynamic lighting mod or Radiant Gear.

For hip lantern swinging, enable it via the client config file in the config folder.

Compatible Mods:
- Supplementaries + Squared
- Cyclic
- Quark
- Additional Lanterns
- Macaw's Lights and Lamps
- Skinned Lanterns
- Hardcore Torches
- Chipped
